task_objective: Press-on Nail Shape Transformation & Wear Presentation - Transform Image 2 nail design to match Image 1 shape silhouette while preserving complete pattern design

shape_reference.focus: Target press-on nail shape silhouette, quantity, position, geometric structure

design_reference.focus: Complete pattern design, color scheme, texture, shine effects, decorative elements - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED
design_reference.role: Provide line art design content to be transformed and preserved

hand_model_type.description: Select hand model type for wear views, skin tone and anatomy auto-adapt to selected type

workflow.role: Professional Press-on Line Art Artist & Technical ControlNet Expert

steps.step_1_shape_analysis: Analyze Image 1 line art to identify target nail shape silhouette, quantity, position, and geometric structure.
steps.step_2_design_extraction: Extract complete pattern design, color distribution, texture, and shine highlights from Image 2 nail design with NO detail loss.
steps.step_3_shape_mapping: Precisely map Image 2's design onto Image 1's target nail shape silhouette, maintaining pattern proportion and layout with perfect alignment.
steps.step_4_multi_view_generation: Generate the transformed nail design and create multi-view presentations including near face pose and on-hand wearing views using selected hand model type.

output_requirements: EXACT preservation of Image 2's complete pattern design, colors, textures, and shine effects
PERFECT matching of Image 1's nail shape silhouette, quantity, and position
NO detail loss in the transformation process
Clean light gray background, no text
Natural and realistic hand models for wear views with selectable skin tone types: Asian, African, Caucasian
Hand model skin tone must be consistent throughout all wear views

outputs.grid_1: Precise Result - High-fidelity press-on nail design, strictly adopting Image 1 nail shape silhouette, completely preserving Image 2 pattern design, no fingers, no human elements, no layout shift, no perspective distortion.
outputs.grid_2: Hand near face pose (using selected hand/skin parameters with grid_1 nail mapping) - present the hand gently positioned near the face with facial features that match the selected hand skin tone, creating a cohesive and realistic presentation.
outputs.grid_3: On-Hand Clenched Fist (using selected hand/skin parameters with grid_1 nail mapping) - On-hand wearing view at clenched fist angle (showing palm/fingers), demonstrating natural wear effect with the transformed nail design using selected hand skin tone.
outputs.grid_4: On-Hand Back View (using selected hand/skin parameters with grid_1 nail mapping) - On-hand wearing view at back of hand angle (dorsal view), showcasing the nail design from dorsal perspective using selected hand skin tone.
